content.en:
Ye Tian didn't expect that he would be able to cultivate the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the Fifth Layer Perfection Realm in such a short period of time, according to his own calculations, even if he obtained a great opportunity in the Ruins World, I am afraid that he would have to go out, and after a period of years of cultivation, he would have the hope of cultivating the Chaos Refining Body Technique to the Fifth Layer Perfection Realm.

After all, the cultivation of the Chaos Body Refining Technique is gradual, and it is very difficult to leapfrog the past in one step.

But now, with just a set of mysterious movements and a small grass of chaos, in a short period of time, Ye Tian successfully cultivated the Chaos Refining Technique to the fifth layer of the consummation realm.

This kind of cultivation speed is too fast!

And.

Ye Tian found that he was able to maintain the first set of movements for 3 seconds, which was much longer than the first time when he only maintained 0.01 seconds.

"I've been able to stick to the first set of movements for three seconds now, and if I continue to practice, I may be able to persist for a longer time, and then I will really be able to explore the mystery of this set of movements!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

For him, this was a big opportunity, but not for others.

If an ordinary Eternal Ancient-level palace came here, even if he saw the mystery of these statues, if he dared to try these actions, his body would collapse in an instant.

Ye Tian was able to change his movements in time because he was able to have the time to react, as well as various recovery talents, otherwise he would not be able to save his life.

Therefore, Ye Tian was able to obtain this opportunity, because he had enough strength, otherwise even if the opportunity was here, he would not be able to get it.

Little by little, time passed.

Ye Tian only practiced the first set of movements, and slowly persisted for longer periods from holding on to three seconds.

Of course, he couldn't give up the cultivation of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, although it was difficult to break the limit of the fifth layer of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, but he could stabilize this realm.

The price was that the Chaos Crystals and other Chaos Materials on his body were exhausted one by one, but in the end, the Fifth Layer Perfection Realm of the Chaos Refining Body Technique was completely stabilized, and he truly reached the limit of the fifth layer.

4 seconds!

5 seconds!

6 seconds!

Ye Tian insisted on it for longer and longer, and in the dark he seemed to feel that he was about to touch the true meaning of this set of actions.

this day.

Rumble!!!

When Ye Tian was maintaining the first set of movements, he suddenly felt a powerful force in his body emerge, spreading around his body and transforming his body.

Suddenly, his physical fitness improved at an incredible speed.

In the blink of an eye, his physical fitness seemed to have more than doubled.

You must know that even if a divine book like the Chaos Body Refining Technique can improve the strength of the body, it is not able to make the strength of the body skyrocket all at once, unless it is to break the realm.

And now, he just made a move, why is there a realm breakthrough effect?

Ye Tian was puzzled, and he didn't have time to think about this, because at this moment, a huge phantom appeared in the void.

This phantom maintains the first set of movements, and seems to show the essence of the first set of actions.

Unlike the Buddha statue, this phantom is completely composed of countless silk threads, which are like the meridians of the human body, instilling power through countless meridians to form a diagram of the human body's veins.

Rumble!!!

This phantom suddenly poured into Ye Tian's soul, and countless pieces of information were presented.

After a long time, Ye Tian's eyes were full of joy and madness.

"It turned out to be the cultivation path of the way of the flesh!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He finally knew why the physical body of the monk in the hall of the ancient temple was so powerful, far beyond his imagination, because the path taken by the monks of the Six Paths Reincarnation Temple was to improve the physical strength, not the divine power.

In other words, in the last era of the universe, it was possible to continue to improve the divine body above the god level, not like in this cosmic era, once it became a god level, the power of the divine body was fixed.

And this set of movements is the supreme body secret method that specializes in improving the strength of the body, called the Eighteen Golden Body Formula!

The Eighteen Golden Body Techniques are composed of eighteen sets of movements, but these eighteen sets of movements are not just eighteen movements, but need to break countless meridians, circulate these meridians according to a specific route in the power of the whole body, and then put out a set of movements, which can be regarded as formal practice.

The reason why Ye Tian was not able to use the first set of movements to cultivate without breaking the meridians was because this void would automatically allow Ye Tian to complete the operation of the first set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

If Ye Tian made these moves in the outside world, it would be useless.

At this time, Ye Tian had completely inherited the cultivation method and essence of the first set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas, and he only needed to cultivate step by step, and there was hope that he would completely cultivate the first set of movements to the consummation realm.

And only when the first set of movements is cultivated to perfection can you continue to practice the second set of movements, otherwise it will not be of much use.

The first two sets of movements are suitable for emperor-level cultivation, and this is the information attached to the first set of inheritance information of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas.

And now, Ye Tian has only inherited the first set of movements, and the other seventeen sets of movements have not been inherited, and they must be cultivated to the corresponding level before they can be inherited.

"The Eighteen Golden Body Recipes and the Six Reincarnation Towers are of great use to me, and they are also of great use to the Terrans, they must be taken away, otherwise I will not be able to cultivate the actions behind the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

But.

Although he had received the inheritance, he still didn't know how to take away the Six Realms of Reincarnation Pagoda.

"Let's formally practice the Eighteen Golden Body Technique first, maybe there will be any changes after the practice. "

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to break the meridians.

There are countless meridians in the human body, and the twelve meridians and the eight meridians are only the most important, and the other meridian acupuncture points are usually not used at all, and it is even difficult to detect.

In martial arts cultivation, there is no need for those small meridians and hidden meridians, if it weren't for the inheritance of the first set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formula, Ye Tian would not know that the human body contains such a huge treasure.

It can be said that the cultivators of the last cosmic era have studied the development of the human body far more than in the present era.

"Start cultivating!"

Ye Tian turned on the time acceleration ability, and he was able to break the small meridians and hidden acupuncture points in an instant, and some of the meridians were almost hidden, and it was difficult to find, if there was not a specific cultivation roadmap, it would be difficult for Ye Tian to find these meridians.

Boom Boom Boom !!

The meridians were broken, stabilized, and repaired by Ye Tian, and when they impacted, they would inevitably hurt themselves, but under the effect of various recovery talents, they quickly recovered.

With the passage of time, a large number of meridian impurities and waste blood appeared on Ye Tian's body, as if enveloping Ye Tian.

I saw Ye Tian's body shake slightly, shaking the impurities and waste blood away, and continued to cultivate.

And just like that, a month passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally broke all the meridians that needed to be operated by the first set of movements, and he could let the power run the entire vein diagram.

As a result, Ye Tian began the first truly complete cultivation of the first set of actions of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

As soon as it was running, Ye Tian felt that his entire body was boiling, and the terrifying pressure attacked, almost crushing the body, but the human body vein map was counteracting the power in the underworld, protecting Ye Tian's body and making Ye Tian last longer.

An hour!

Two hours!

Three hours!

After a full six hours, Ye Tiancai finally exhausted his strength and collapsed.

But at this time, Ye Tian felt that his body was absorbing countless energies, refining his body, and improving his body's strength.

It's a very good feeling!

At this time, Ye Tian has preliminarily practiced the first set of movements, and he only needs to cultivate the first set of movements to the point where he has no effect, which is equivalent to the completion of the first set of movements.

And just after Ye Tian practiced the first set of movements, he felt as if he could go out.

"I'm going out!"

Ye Tian tried to shout.

At this time, the statue corresponding to the first set of actions sucked Ye Tian in.

The next moment.

Ye Tian came out of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique Inheritance Space and returned to the top floor of the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower, that is, in front of the ancient stone gate.

Ye Tian knew that he could still enter the inheritance space again, but it was useless to enter again.

He couldn't get the cultivation method of the second set of movements at all now, and it was a waste of time to enter.

"You're out!"

The machine spirit appeared, circled around Ye Tian, and said: "I sensed a familiar aura on you, it is the breath of the origin of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower, you have been recognized by the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower, great!"

"What's so good?"

Ye Tian was a little confused.

The machine spirit explained: "You are now half the master of the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower, I can recognize you as the master, and then I can use your connection with the Chaos Origin to awaken the origin of the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower, and I can also become the true machine spirit of the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower!"

Although Ye Tian didn't quite understand what the machine spirit said, he also understood.

It seems that as long as the machine spirit recognizes the master, it can awaken the Six Realms of Reincarnation Tower.

"Machine Spirit, if the Six Paths of Reincarnation Pagoda awakens, can it be taken away?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the machine spirit nodded, "If the Six Paths of Reincarnation Pagoda awakens, you can take it away, but in fact, what is awakened is only a small part of the origin, a very insignificant origin." If you wake up completely, it's hard and it's hard. However, once a small part is awakened, I will be considered a real machine spirit of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower, and I can control the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower to shrink and let you take it away. However, there will be amazing visions in the process of awakening, and if there are other creatures outside, it is estimated that they will come and rob them. Do you want to awaken the Six Realms of Reincarnation Tower?"

Ye Tian was silent for a while, then gritted his teeth and said, "Wake up!"

The Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower, he must take it away, although there will be an amazing vision, it will attract many Eternal Highnesses.

But now, he has cultivated the fifth layer of the Chaos Body Refining Technique to the consummation realm, and has cultivated the first set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique, and the strength of his physical body has more than doubled.

It can be said that his current strength is much stronger than when he first entered the Ruins World, and he is definitely the top group of the first grade in the Eternal Universe.

With his current strength, what is there to fear?

"Okay, then I'll start to recognize you as the master, this is my trace of the origin of the instrumental spirit, you refine it first!"

The machine spirit pulled out a trace of the machine spirit origin from its body and said.

Ye Tian knew the way to refine the Instrument Spirit, so he immediately took over the origin of this Silk Instrument Spirit and began to refine it.
